issues.sample: BEHAVIOR OF MY CAR'S DCT TRANSMISSION HAS CREATED A DANGEROUS SITUATION WHICH ALMOST RESULTED IN AN ACCIDENT FOR ME. I BELIEVE THIS IS DUE TO A SOFTWARE CHANGE BMW MADE TO THE DCT TRANSMISSION. THE ISSUE IS AS FOLLOWS:    -WHEN DRIVING AT HIGHWAY SPEED, WHEN YOU RELEASE THE THROT

narrative.headline: What 2014 Bmw M5 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (100% of reports).
